location: Guaranteed drop from Inquisitor Ghiza, a red phantom invader who ambushes you in the upstairs dining hall of Volcano Manor, above the manor's main Site of Grace.
tactics: Ghiza invades automatically as you cross the long dining hall — there's no fog gate, so be ready for the ambush mid-room
The wheel's spinning attacks build blood loss quickly; avoid getting boxed in against the dining tables lining the hall
This is a one-time guaranteed drop, so no repeat farming is needed once you've won
lore: Originally an instrument of torture — a great iron wheel lined with skin-flaying blades meant to inflict slow, bleeding agony — the design was later adopted by the Iron Virgins as their signature weapon.

builds.name: Bleed-focused quality build
builds.why: Its built-in hemorrhage buildup pairs well with bleed-boosting talismans like Lord of Blood's Exultation for burst procs, even without weapon Arcane scaling.
